name: Light Shrimp Scampi
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Medium-sized shrimp, shelled and deveined
4 teaspoons Fresh lemon zest, finely grated
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat the oil with the garlic over moderate-to-high heat.
When the garlic sizzles, add the shrimp and sauté just until they turn pink,
about 1 minute.
2. Stir in the fish stock, wine, parsley, and lemon zest.
3. In a small cup or bowl, stir the cornstarch into the lemon juice until it
dissolves. Then stir that mixture into the ingredients in the skillet.
4. Simmer until the sauce begins to thicken slightly, about 1 minute.
5. Spoon the sauce over cooked pasta. Season generously with black pepper.
